examples: The bandy is small but deadly and in an area where people work in an open sandals or even on barefoot, there are few protective measures.
An upstart like that dares to bandy words with me!
The optimal throw of the dice is to bandy them abroad.
"He has a very good chance to win, " said Lee Bandy, political reporter for The State newspaper in Columbia.
But how harmful is it to bandy the names of such conditions about?
